theme.description: High information density, precision-focused financial dashboard for Indian markets. Emphasizes dark gray/navy backgrounds (#0a0e1a), bold legible typography, and tight control-room bento grids.

spacing_and_layout.container_structure: Three-column fixed layout: Left Sidebar (animated width 64px to 200px), Main Content (flex-1, overflow-y-auto), Right Chat Panel (fixed 320px or collapsible).

components.cards: Flat background (#111827), 1px solid border (#1f2937), no soft shadows. Add subtle hover state (bg-[#1f2937]).
components.buttons: Primary buttons use #3b82f6 bg, high contrast text. Secondary buttons use transparent bg with #1f2937 border. Active state must be clearly highlighted.
components.charts: Use Recharts. Tooltips should use surface color (#111827) and border (#1f2937). Use primary, positive, and negative colors for data lines/bars.
components.sidebar: Hover expansion powered by framer-motion. Keep icons horizontally centered when collapsed, and fade-in text when expanded.
components.chat_panel: Scrollable message area. Input field fixed at bottom. AI messages left-aligned with AI avatar, User messages right-aligned. AI Avatar should use provided media url.

interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have a visible hover state (e.g., bg-[#1f2937] for rows).
interactions.sidebar_animation: Smooth layout transition using framer-motion on width. spring stiffness 300, damping 30.
interactions.chat_animation: New messages should slide up and fade in.

images.description: Minimalist 3D glassmorphic geometric icon for the dashboard brand logo. Use in the top of the sidebar.
Sleek futuristic 3D sphere representing the AI assistant. Use in the right chat panel next to AI responses.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a 4-page dashboard: Market Overview, Research Session, Signals & Alerts, Macro Dashboard.
Implement the 3-column layout: Sidebar (left), Main Content (center), AI Chat (right).
Make the sidebar expand from 64px to 200px on hover using Framer Motion.
The AI Chat panel must have a text input that allows typing, appending user messages to the view, followed by a mocked AI response after a short delay.
Use Recharts for financial charts (stock trends, FII/DII flow).
Include IRFC stock prominently in the Top Movers or Market Overview.
Do NOT use HTML inputs directly for advanced interactions, but for the chat input a standard Tailwind-styled input or Shadcn Input is fine.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
Ensure text contrast is high. Use text_primary (#f9fafb) for headings/values and text_secondary (#9ca3af) for labels.
Adhere strictly to the color palette provided. Do not introduce new colors except for chart data lines using the palette.
